mapper.insert: INSERT INTO terms ( category, title, content, version, is_required, status, effective_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{version}, #{required}, #{status}, #{effectiveAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE terms SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, version = #{version}, is_required = #{required}, effective_at = #{effectiveAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE term_id = #{termId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
